# ACTUMX MCP Tools

> MCP Endpoint: `POST /mcp`
> Auth: `x-api-key: <key>` or `Authorization: Bearer <key>`

## wallet_balance

Return the selected agent wallet balance on Solana.

| Argument | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `agentId` | string | No | Agent ID. If omitted, uses your most recent agent. |

## wallet_send

Send SOL from the selected agent wallet to another Solana wallet.

| Argument | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `toPublicKey` | string | Yes | Destination Solana wallet address. |
| `amountSol` | number | Yes | Amount of SOL to send (must be > 0). |
| `agentId` | string | No | Agent ID. If omitted, uses your most recent agent. |
